description_long: This is an ornate, antique-style chest of drawers with a luxurious marble top and intricate gold embellishments. The chest features three large, curved drawers, each adorned with elaborate gold handles and decorative motifs. The wood is dark and richly finished, contrasting with the white and gray veined marble surface. Atop the chest sits a grand, vintage clock with a gold frame and a sculpted figure on its crest, adding to the object's opulent appearance. The legs of the chest are short and curved, further emphasizing its baroque design. The overall craftsmanship and decorative details suggest it is a statement piece, likely intended for a formal or prestigious setting.
description: An ornate, antique chest of drawers with a marble top, gold embellishments, and a decorative clock on top. Features three curved drawers and intricate detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing three curved drawers, ornate gold handles, and the decorative clock on the marble top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chest, the marble top's edge, and the profile of the clock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chest and clock, with minimal decorative features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the marble top's contour and the side profile of the chest and clock.
